popularStory.description: William Leete was born about 1613 in Dodington, Huntingdonshire, England, the son of John Leete and Anne Shute, daughter of Robert Shute, a judge of the king's court. His grandfather's legal experienc …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Governor William Leete, Sr.於1613年4月16日出生在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾時，他的父親John Leete of Dodington37歲，母親Anne Shute37歲。他於1636年8月1日與Anne Payne在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾海爾 韋斯頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1680年住在英國英格蘭賀特福爾。他去世於1683年4月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德享年70歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦安希特 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Governor William Leete, Sr.于1613年4月16日出生在英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾时，他的父亲John Leete of Dodington37岁，母亲Anne Shute37岁。他于1636年8月1日与Anne Payne在英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾海爾 韋斯頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1680年住在英国英格兰賀特福爾。他去世于1683年4月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德享年70岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦安希特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Leete,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: An early American bearer of this name was one of the founders ofGuilford, CT. William Leete (c. 1613–83), a colonial governorof New Haven colony and CT, was born at Dodington, Huntingtonshire,England. He converted to Puritanism and sailed for America to escapepersecution in May 1639.

variants.name: Leet
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a watercourse orroad junction, Old English gelǣt, or a habitational namefrom Leat in Devon, or The Leete in Essex, named with this element.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: Oldest Grave seen in the Memorials list.
On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

en.lifeSummary: When Governor William Leete, Sr. was born on 16 April 1613, in Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Leete of Dodington, was 37 and his mother, Anne Shute, was 37. He married Anne Payne on 1 August 1636, in Hail Weston, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom in 1680. He died on 16 April 1683, in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 70, and was buried in Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Governor William Leete, Sr. est né le 16 avril 1613, à Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Leete of Dodington, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Anne Shute, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Anne Payne le 1 août 1636, à Hail Weston, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1680. Il est décédé le 16 avril 1683, à Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Governor William Leete, Sr. am 16. April 1613 in Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Leete of Dodington 37 und seine Mutter Anne Shute 37. Er hat am 1. August 1636 in Hail Weston, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom Anne Payne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1680 hat er in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb am 16. April 1683 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Governor William Leete, Sr. è nato il il 16 aprile 1613 nel Huntingdonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Leete of Dodington, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Anne Shute, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Anne Payne il 1 agosto 1636, nel Hail Weston, Huntingdonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1680. Morì il 16 aprile 1683, nel Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Governor William Leete, Sr.が1613年4月16日にイギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Leete of Dodingtonは37歳，母Anne Shuteは37歳であった。1636年8月1日にイギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアヘイル ウエストンでAnne Payneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1680年にはイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアに住んでいた。彼は1683年4月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードで70歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドンアンシエント セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Governor William Leete, Sr.(이)가 1613년 4월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Leete of Dodington(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Shute(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1636년 8월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 하일 웨스턴에서 Anne Payne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1680년도에 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 살았다. 그는 1683년 4월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던 앤시트 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Governor William Leete, Sr. nasceu em 16 de abril de 1613, em Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Leete of Dodington, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Anne Shute, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Payne em 1 de agosto de 1636, em Hail Weston, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1680. Ele faleceu em 16 de abril de 1683, em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Governor William Leete, Sr. родился 16 апреля 1613 г. в местности хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Leete of Dodington было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Shute, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Payne 1 августа 1636 г. в местности хеил вестон, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1680 году. Он умер 16 апреля 1683 г. в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности ансиент кеметири, ню лондон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Governor William Leete, Sr. nació el 16 de abril de 1613, en Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Leete of Dodington, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Anne Shute, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Anne Payne el 1 de agosto de 1636, en Hail Weston, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1680. Murió el 16 de abril de 1683, en Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Ancient Cemetery, New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
